entries.text: Starting to document this properly. Building a digital growth agency from scratch — no clients yet, no playbook, just figuring out the first real steps: who I want to serve, what I can actually deliver, and how to get the first conversation.

Digital Growth Agency - Offering Website Development, Google Business Growth, Local SEO, Social Media Growth, AI Automation, Branding & Design, Content Creation, Reputation Management, Analytics & Reporting, Website Maintenance, Paid Advertising, Online Commerce.

📈 DAILY PROGRESS REPORT — SAKSHAM BASNET

📅 Date: July 7, 2026

💡 Knowledge I Gained

• Learned how websites can become recurring income instead of one-time sales.
• Understood the difference between selling a website and selling business growth.
• Learned what services a Digital Growth Agency can offer.
• Learned the basics of Meta Paid Advertising.
• Learned how to use AI as a business strategist instead of just generating websites.
• Understood how agencies build recurring monthly revenue through maintenance, SEO, hosting, and ongoing services.

🎯 Decisions I Made

☑ Build a Digital Growth Agency instead of just a website business.
☑ Focus on helping local businesses grow their online presence.
☑ Create service packages instead of selling only websites.
☑ Continue learning paid advertising.

🛠️ Tasks to Complete

☐ Learn Meta Ads Manager in depth.
☐ Learn Google Ads basics.
☐ Develop a client onboarding process.

🚀 Long-Term Vision

I don't want to be known as someone who builds websites.

I want people to say:

"If you want your business to grow online, contact Saksham."

📝 Reflection

Today wasn't about learning another technical skill.

It was about defining the business I want to build.

I now have a clearer direction: build a Digital Growth Agency that combines websites, digital marketing, AI, and automation to help businesses grow while creating recurring monthly revenue.

Every skill I learn from this point forward should move me one step closer to that vision.
